input.text: The goverment has announced a new iniative to support small buisnesses in rural areas. The programme, which will be role out over the next twelve months, aims to provide financial assisstance and mentoring to entrepreneurs who's businesses are based outside of major urban centres. Applicants will need to demostrate that there business has been operating for atleast two years. The minister said that the programme would compliment existing support schemes.
input.house_style: Oxford comma: yes. Spell out numbers under ten.

input.text: Their going to announce the results on wendsday. The committee has all ready made it's decision.

The Europian Commission's proposal for a regulation on artifical intelligence, which was first tabled in April 2021, has undergone substancial revisions during the legislative proccess. The final text, wich was adopted by the European Parliment in March 2024, establishes a risk-based aproach to AI goverance. High-risk AI systems, including those used in law enforcment and employment desicions, are subject to strict requirments including mandatory conformaty assessments and transparancy obligations.

The organizaton recieved a $2.4 million dollar grant to persue it's research into the affects of social media on adolesent mental health. Researchers will analize data from approximatly 5,000 particpants across fourty states. Prelimenary findings suggest that their is a correlaton between screen time and anxeity levels, though the causal mechanisim remains unclear. The principle investigator emphasised that this study is observational and should not be interpretted as definative proof.
input.house_style: AP style. Numbers: spell out one through nine, use figures for 10 and above. Oxford comma: no.

input.text: The quarterly earnings report showed a 12% increase in revenue, driven primarily by strong performance in the Asia-Pacific region. Operating margins improved by 2.3 percentage points, reflecting cost reductions achieved through the restructuring programme announced in January. The board declared an interim dividend of 14.5 pence per share, payable on 15 March. Net debt fell to £340 million from £412 million a year earlier.

The confrence in São Paulo brought together researchers from the Academié Française, the Max Plank Institute, and the Univeristy of Zürich. Dr. Müeller presented findings on the Schrödinger equation's applicatons in quantum computing, while Professor García-López discussed the implcations for the Higgs Bosun field. The keynote was deliverd by Dr. François Beaumont of the Centre Nationel de la Recherche Scientifque.
input.house_style: Preserve original diacritics and accents on foreign proper nouns. Do not anglicise.
